name: Peppermint Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 milk chocolate candy bars (1/45 oz.), finely crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes. Cool.
3. Soften the gelatin in water; stir over low heat until dissolved.
4. Combine the cream cheese and sugar, mixing at medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
5. Gradually add the gelatin, milk, and peppermint candy, mixing until blended. Chill until thickened but not set.
6. Fold in the whipped cream and chocolate; pour over the crust.
7. Chill until firm. Garnish with additional whipping cream, whipped combined with crushed peppermint candy, if desired.
8. 10-12 servings.
